category_sources: source_facts.description says Cowsay but with ponies; official GitHub README at https://github.com/erkin/ponysay describes ponysay as a cowsay reimplementation for ponies.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ponysay; official README renders the command name as ponysay: https://github.com/erkin/ponysay.
docs_sources: Official README provides usage and points to an extensive manual PDF: https://github.com/erkin/ponysay#readme and https://github.com/erkin/ponysay/blob/master/ponysay.pdf.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/erkin/ponysay, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe a cowsay-style terminal program; source_facts.executables lists ponysay, ponythink, and ponysay-tool.
